DESC.TITLE: About me
DESC.NAME: José Alejandro Arias
DESC.DESCRIPCION_1: Systems engineer focused on cloud architecture and scalable data-driven solutions on AWS. Experienced in event-driven architectures using S3, Glue, Lambda, API Gateway, and Snowflake. Certified in Linux Essentials and Git Essential.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_2: Strong expertise in software development and system integration with Java, Spring Boot, Angular, and TypeScript. Proficient in container orchestration with Kubernetes and Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure as code.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_3: Experienced in Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and DevOps practices including continuous integration and delivery. Knowledgeable in COBIT 2019, TDD, and MDD (Model Driven Development). Competent in project management tools like Asana and Confluence.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_4: Analytical, creative, and fast learner committed to open-source software and emerging cloud technologies. Passionate about leveraging AI and automation to build robust, efficient solutions. Mentor mindset focused on team growth and knowledge sharing.

PROYECTOS.SUBTITLE: Portfolio
PROYECTOS.TITLE: Work and Projects
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_1: Interactive project generating real-time graphics of students, teachers, and administrators.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_2: Interactive clinic project managing appointments, doctors, patients, and user login and registration system.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_3: Backend project exposing REST services for a clinic project, using a MySQL database and Spring Boot.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_4: Web scraping project extracting data from Mercadolibre for any product and country.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_5: Brute force WiFi network attack project using Java and the aircrack-ng library.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_6: Project explaining creational, structural, and behavioral design patterns.

CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_1: Design and implementation of cloud-native solutions on AWS. Development of event-driven architectures using S3, Glue, Lambda, API Gateway, and Snowflake. Container orchestration with Kubernetes and Docker. Automation of CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code.
CARRERA-ITEM.TITLE_2: GRID Research Group - University of Quindío
CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_2: Research group focused on MDD (Model Driven Development) and virtualization projects using Docker and containerd. Development of software tools to increase productivity.
CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_3: Private project manager responsible for administration and management of information systems.
CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_4: Professional studies in Systems and Computing Engineering at the University of Quindío.
CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_5: Google certified in project management using agile and waterfall methodologies.
CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_6: Certifications in Linux Essentials and Git Essential, Alura Latam.
